takeaways: Market declined (Nifty -0.83%). Look for opportunities in quality stocks with strong fundamentals — dips are for accumulating, not panicking.
Sector rotation: Energy leads (+11.5% month), IT lags (-20.4%). Consider tilting new allocation toward sectors with strong momentum.
22 watchlist stocks show accumulate signals: MAFANG, NETWEB, POLICYBZR, PERSISTENT, MAZDOCK. Build positions in 2-3 tranches; max 6% per name.
6 watchlist stocks on wait: NTPC, APOLLOHOSP, CHOLAFIN. Avoid catching falling knives — wait for trend reversal confirmation.
Macro watch: Crude at $65.71, USD/INR at 90.92. Rising crude or weakening INR can pressure IT/pharma margins short-term but often creates accumulation opportunities in exporters.
Position sizing: Max 6% in any single name. Multi-year horizon — don't chase momentum; buy quality on weakness. Tax-efficient if held > 1 year.
